hotels.name: Marriott International

unite_here_disputes.summary: 10,000+ workers struck at Marriott, Hilton, Hyatt properties across 9 US cities over Labor Day weekend; included Marriott's W and Westin flags.

ada_consent_decrees.summary: DOJ settlement — Marriott franchisees agreed to remedy reservation-system accessibility for travelers with disabilities across 600+ properties.

hotels.notes: Largest US hotel labor strike of 2024 included Marriott flags. No Green Key Global certified properties under Marriott flags as of 2025.

hotels.name: Hilton

unite_here_disputes.summary: Hilton San Francisco Union Square, Hilton Hawaiian Village, and DoubleTree by Hilton properties were struck during the multi-city UNITE HERE walkout.

ada_consent_decrees.summary: DOJ ADA settlement — Hilton agreed to make reservation policies, websites, and 200+ owned/managed properties accessible.

other_certifications: WELL Building Standard at select properties

hotels.name: Hyatt Hotels

unite_here_disputes.summary: Park Hyatt Chicago, Hyatt Regency San Francisco, Grand Hyatt San Francisco struck during multi-city UNITE HERE walkout.
Hyatt Regency Long Beach workers held first-ever strike at the property in November 2023.

hotels.notes: Hyatt has acknowledged UNITE HERE as the union for ~60% of its US owned/managed properties.

hotels.name: Wyndham Hotels & Resorts

ada_consent_decrees.summary: DOJ Title III consent decree — Wyndham franchise system agreed to website-accessibility and reservation-policy reforms after class action.

hotels.notes: Highest NORS-attributed outbreak count among major US chains 2020-2025 (Days Inn, Super 8, Ramada flags); largely a franchisee-control issue.

hotels.name: Choice Hotels
hotels.notes: Comfort Inn, Quality Inn, Econo Lodge flags have appeared in CDC NORS norovirus outbreak summaries 2020-2025.

unite_here_disputes.summary: Crowne Plaza Times Square Manhattan and InterContinental Mark Hopkins SF struck during multi-city UNITE HERE walkout.
Culinary Union (UNITE HERE Local 226) reached new 5-year contract with Venetian Resort covering 7,000+ workers after strike-authorization vote.
Culinary Union reached tentative 5-year deal with MGM Resorts covering 25,000+ workers at MGM Grand, Mandalay Bay, Bellagio, ARIA hours before strike deadline.

ada_consent_decrees.summary: DOJ ADA settlement — MGM Resorts agreed to accessibility improvements across 13 Las Vegas properties after Title III complaint.

unite_here_disputes.summary: Culinary Union reached tentative 5-year deal with Caesars Entertainment covering 10,000+ workers at Caesars Palace, Harrah's, Flamingo, Paris hours before strike deadline.

hotels.name: Airbnb

unite_here_disputes.summary: UNITE HERE has actively lobbied US cities to restrict Airbnb's short-term rental conversions, arguing it removes housing stock and threatens hotel-worker jobs.

hotels.notes: Not a hotel chain but appears in UNITE HERE policy advocacy and DOJ Title III commentary as a platform without uniform accessibility compliance.

ada_consent_decrees.summary: DOJ ADA review — Expedia agreed to ensure third-party booking pages on Expedia, Hotels.com, Vrbo provide accessibility data fields per Title III.

hotels.name: Booking Holdings
hotels.notes: Booking.com surfaces Travel Sustainable badges on listings (proprietary) but the parent has not been DOJ-sanctioned on Title III to date.

license: Source attributions include CDC (public domain), DOJ (public domain), UNITE HERE (press releases — fair-use citation), Green Key Global (public registry).
methodology: Per-chain rollup of UNITE HERE strike archive (unitehere.org/news/strikes), CDC NORS outbreak attributions (wwwn.cdc.gov/norsdashboard), DOJ Civil Rights Division ADA Title III consent decrees (ada.gov/cases), and Green Key Global certified-property counts.
